calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for Settlement Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Deborah Neville.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff Michelle Horneff also present.
Defendant,Louis La Marca present in pro per.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2003 Advanced From Jun-16-03 To Jun-05-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq., Bornstein & Bornstein, 415-409-7611, for plaintiff/opposing party Property Management Systems.
*Appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling uncontested and adopted -- DEFENDANT LOUIS LA MARCA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED, DEFENDANT HAS 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780 (DAG/301/SL)
